hero.question: Will Rory McIlroy win the 2026 Masters tournament?
hero.prob_take: At 23.5%, the crowd is pricing McIlroy as a solid top-10 favorite but not a legitimate title threat, which feels about right given his recent major form has been pedestrian and the 2026 field will be loaded. The 17-point pump in 24 hours suggests some whisper about his offseason training or equipment changes, but without confirmation that's just noise buying into a narrative rather than signal, so you fade the move here.

daily_take.headline: McIlroy's Masters Price Just Spiked 17 Points. Here's Why You Should Fade It.
daily_take.deck: Rory's odds jumped to 23.5% in 24 hours on what looks like casual money rolling in. But the fundamentals haven't changed. He's a good golfer in a weak field, sure, but Augusta rewards patience and course management more than raw talent. Smart money waits for the spike to settle before taking the other side at better odds.
